## Summary by cubic
Added AGENTS.md with a high-level overview of Gate22 and its repository structure to help coding agents and contributors navigate the project. It maps backend and frontend directories, services, and key files, laying the groundwork for future build, testing, and style guidance.

## Acceptance

The grader runs `pytest /tests/test_outputs.py` which checks that distinctive
literal strings from the intended update are present in the target file(s).
You do not need to write any code outside of the markdown file(s).
